name: The Golokstone
description: A glade in the forest containing a circle of two-foot-high scarlet toadstools ringing a ten-foot sandstone slab cracked down the middle. The slab bears markings in an unreadable ancient script. The Drune Aetho Grym claims this as the domain of the Drune alone.
notes: The toadstool ring burst spores when the party approached, triggering vivid religious hallucinations — saints beckoning, sacred figures across a dissolving threshold.
The slab's markings are in a script the party did not recognise. Arcane in nature, though their exact meaning is unknown.
Aetho Grym appeared and told the party to leave and never return. He was accompanied by small figures made of sticks.
The Drune claim this as their exclusive domain, forbidden to mortals and fairies alike.
